summary: FQ-03 equipment data model and character-owned gear slots: new data/equipment.json with 12 slots (weapon, axe, pickaxe, helmet, torso, feet, ring_1-4, amulet, accessory) and item defs (pick_basic/pick_forged/axe_crude live via pick_tier/axe_tier effects; inert ring_band), loaded by the BlockRegistry autoload with fit/normalize/tier helpers. player.tool_tier/axe_tier remain the live mining authority; equipment is the persistence and display shape — equipped_dict() derives the tool slots from live tiers so UI/saves can never drift from behavior, the 10 non-tool slots are character-owned slot-ready data for FQ-04, and equip_item validates slot/item fit (tool slots cannot be cleared). Character records gain an equipment dict; both migration branches persist derived gear immediately without losing inventory or tiers; backpack stays separate. Read-only EQUIPMENT section in the inventory panel with visible empty slots. Validator enforces the schema. Smoke 142 -> 149, all green. Review's two should-fix findings and three nits fixed and re-verified before commit.
scope: FQ-03 only, per docs/FABLE_TASK_QUEUE.md. Implementation commit e234e89 plus this evidence-only packet commit.
next_action: FQ-04: first combat gear slice — sword, armor mitigation, toolbelt display.
